constraints.coverage_assumption: User refers to "Attention Is All You Need" (Vaswani et al., 2017) as the Transformer original paper; in-corpus reference is paper_id attention_is_all_you_need_2017.

normalized_question: Extract the exact Adam optimizer hyperparameters (beta1, beta2, epsilon) used in the original Transformer paper "Attention Is All You Need" (2017).

obligations.description: What value of beta1 did the original Transformer paper use for Adam optimizer?
What value of beta2 did the original Transformer paper use for Adam optimizer?
What value of epsilon did the original Transformer paper use for Adam optimizer?

raw_question: Transformer original paper used Adam with what beta1, beta2, and epsilon?
required_evidence_types: exact text from paper specifying optimizer hyperparameters
